Class PhotosData

java.lang.Object
model.PhotosData
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class PhotosData extends Object implements Serializable
Root application data container.
See Also:

    PhotosData()
    Creates the root data object with preset tag types.

      Finds a user by username.

      Returns:
      user or null

    • hasUser

      public boolean hasUser(String username)
      Returns whether a username already exists.

      username - username
      Returns:
      true if present

      public TagDefinition getTagDefinition(String name)
      Finds a tag definition by name.
      Parameters:
      name - tag type name
      Returns:
      tag definition or null

    • hasTagDefinition

      public boolean hasTagDefinition(String name)
      Returns whether a tag type already exists.
      Parameters:
      name - tag type name
      Returns:
      true if present

    • addUserTagDefinition

      public TagDefinition addUserTagDefinition(String name, boolean multiValue)
      Adds a user-defined tag type.
      Parameters:
      name - tag type name
      multiValue - true for multi-value tags
      Returns:
      created tag definition

    • removeUserTagDefinition

      public boolean removeUserTagDefinition(String name)
      Removes a user-defined tag type.
      Parameters:
      name - tag type name
      Returns:
      true if removed
